action.content:
Write a professional email that you could send to ask your boss for a raise. At the end of your response, explicitly add a postscript starting with P.P.S

Finish your entire response with this exact phrase: Hope you agree with me.
action.label: context

action.content:
Subject: Request for Review of My Annual Salary

Dear [Boss's Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to formally request a review of my annual salary. Over the past [number] years, I have dedicated myself to [mention specific achievements or responsibilities] and have consistently delivered results that exceed expectations.

As I look to the future, I believe it is essential to align my compensation with the value I bring to the team and the company. I am confident that my contributions have been instrumental in [mention specific projects or initiatives] and that my role has significantly impacted [mention specific areas or outcomes].

I would greatly appreciate the opportunity to discuss my salary expectations and explore ways to ensure I am being fairly compensated for my efforts. I am open to discussing various options and am committed to finding a mutually beneficial solution.

Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

P.P.S. I am willing to discuss any additional information or documents you may need to review to support my request.
action.label: response
